description: Style Note This kurti by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look. Product Details Beige, blue and brown printed kurti with a v-neck, short sleeves with tape detailing, buttoned chest placket with floral embellishments on either sides of the placket and split side seams Material and care Blended fabric Dry clean only Size and Fit Regular The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
